headline: Woman's Books Have 'Started Whispers,' She's Now Running A 'Book Support Group'
summary: The books are 'communicating with each other.' They have opinions on her reading choices.
fullBody: Amanda McBook has discovered her books are 'whispering to each other.' 'They have opinions on what I read,' Amanda said. She's now running a 'book support group' for her books. 'The books discuss their feelings,' Amanda said. 'It's a safe space.' Amanda is now 'considering their recommendations.'
